prompt:
Subject: A woman chasing her own miniature double in a cafe / dynamic cafe fantasy portrait

Person/Expression: A woman in her 20s with a soft oval face, long brown hair, see-through bangs, transparent skin, delicate natural makeup, natural eye bags, slightly large eyes, and an expression of seriousness and slight surprise. The mini character in the foreground is a cute chibi version with the same facial features, hair color, and bangs, closely resembling the larger person.

Clothing/Pose: The large person is wearing an elegant light floral print dress, puffy short sleeves, and white sneakers. She is leaning forward with one hand stretched out wide, and her other arm is clearly visible in the back in a dynamic pose. The mini person is in a school uniform-style outfit with an ivory top, a dark red ribbon, a navy pleated skirt, and brown loafers, running desperately.

Background/Light: Modern cafe interior, wood-grain shelves, large glass windows, glossy floor, soft natural daylight and warm indoor lighting, a large iced drink on the right, reflections on the floor and small splashes emphasizing movement and realism.

Composition/Camera: Ultra-low angle, eye-level with the floor, wide-angle lens, strong perspective, a composition capturing both the mini character running in the foreground and the woman chasing from behind, cinematic wide-angle shot, motion blur, speed lines, dynamic perspective, shallow depth of field to highlight the subject.

Texture/Style: High definition, 4K quality, ultra detailed, skin texture so delicate and clear it's visible even when enlarged, natural skin texture, every strand of hair is clear, realistic AI portrait, an expression that naturally merges real-life and chibi styles, cinematic lighting, sharp and transparent photographic expression.

Negative: Low quality, blurred face, unnatural hands, extra fingers, missing arms, distorted body, facial collapse, mini character and large person's faces do not match, excessive processing, overexposure, text, logo, watermark, brand logo.
